nuggets.text: Synthesys positions itself as an AI content suite that combines avatars, realistic voice-overs, dubbing, and translated video workflows inside one platform.
The product page emphasizes realistic avatars, custom avatars, and UGC-style AI actors with natural emotions, gestures, and voices for marketing and creator workflows.
Synthesys also highlights built-in dubbing plus a voice layer with hundreds of human-sounding voices and multilingual coverage, making it more than a pure avatar tool.
The pricing table includes a Free plan with 10 video generation credits, up to 720p export, 3 slides for AI avatars, 10 Sora2 and VEO3 persona credits, 10,000 voice generation credits, and 1 seat.
Personal is priced at $20 per month and raises limits to 100 video credits, 50,000 voice credits, 10 Sora2 and VEO3 credits, 1 custom video avatar, and up to 1080p export.
Creator is priced at $41 per month and expands usage to 250 video credits, 200,000 voice credits, 40 Sora2 and VEO3 credits, 5 custom video avatars, and fast processing.

Business Unlimited is priced at $69 per month and adds unlimited video and voice credits under fair use, up to 4K export, unlimited custom video avatars, faster processing, 2 seats, and API access in the enterprise section.
The same pricing table shows Business has 30 maximum video slides for AI avatars, while Free has 3, Personal has 6, and Creator has 12.
Synthesys' comparison table includes voice cloning, customizable voices, video and audio dubbing, voice changer, and multi-speaker podcast creation as higher-tier capabilities.
The enterprise callout adds turbo speed generations, unlimited max duration per video, custom usage limits, API, premium custom avatars, priority support, and a dedicated customer success path.

topUpClaims.note: Official refund policy says requests must be submitted within 72 hours of purchase and are only eligible if total usage stays below 5 minutes. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

Official pricing documents plan-level video credits, voice credits, Sora or VEO persona credits, and maximum slide counts by tier. Business Unlimited is publicly positioned as unlimited only under a fair-use model.
Official pricing says Free exports up to 720p, Personal and Creator export up to 1080p, and Business Unlimited exports up to 4K.

The privacy policy says client data is not used to train, retrain, or enhance Synthesys models and that clients retain ownership of their data. Public docs do not fully define a complete visibility model for all generated assets and workspaces.

topUpFlags.note: Current public pricing and policy pages clearly document credits, resolutions, and fair-use limits, but do not cleanly resolve watermark behavior for paid exports.
Public docs support client data ownership and a no-training policy, but they do not fully settle broader ownership and commercial-rights language for generated outputs.
